metadata.name: HubSpot Sales Pipeline
metadata.hero: What does your pipeline actually look like?
metadata.description: Answer HubSpot sales pipeline and funnel questions using Fivetran-synced HubSpot data in BigQuery, Snowflake, or Databricks. Analyzes deal stages, pipeline conversion rates, win/loss outcomes, rep performance, deal velocity, and stage aging using the HubSpot dbt package models.

capabilities.name: Pipeline Funnel
capabilities.description: Stage-by-stage conversion rates and deal counts across the entire pipeline

capabilities.name: Deal Velocity
capabilities.description: Average time deals spend in each stage and overall time-to-close

capabilities.name: Rep Performance
capabilities.description: Deals won, lost, and in-progress broken down by sales rep

capabilities.name: Stage Aging
capabilities.description: Surface stalled deals that have sat in a stage longer than expected

capabilities.name: Win / Loss Analysis
capabilities.description: Breakdown of closed-won vs closed-lost with reason attribution

example_questions: What's our overall pipeline win rate this quarter?
Which stage has the worst conversion rate?
Show me deals that have been in 'Proposal Sent' for more than 30 days
Who closed the most deals last month?
What's the average sales cycle length for deals over $50K?
How does our Q3 pipeline compare to Q2?

quickstart_models.description: dbt models produced by the fivetran/hubspot package. The skill's pipeline funnel, velocity, and aging analyses require at minimum hubspot__deals. Stage-level and historical analyses require the additional recommended models.
